name: ragclaw
description: Local-first knowledge base for RagClaw - index and search documents, code, and web pages

add.description: Index a file, directory, or URL into the knowledge base

read-source.description: Retrieve the full indexed content of a source (all chunks concatenated)

reindex.description: Re-process changed sources; optionally force full rebuild or prune missing sources

status.description: Show knowledge base statistics (chunks, sources, size, embedder, vector backend)

remove.description: Remove a source from the index

db-init.description: Initialize a new named knowledge base

db-list.description: List all available knowledge bases with description and keywords

db-info-set.description: Set or update description and keywords for a knowledge base

db-info-get.description: Get the description and keywords stored for a knowledge base

db-merge.description: Merge another knowledge base SQLite file into the local one

chunkers-list.description: List all available chunkers (built-in and plugin-provided)

doctor.description: Check system health: Node.js, RAM, sqlite-vec, embedder compatibility, plugins
